name: Pagination
description: Pagination breaks a large dataset into pages an operator can move through — page-number buttons plus previous/next, the standard way to navigate the thousands of vehicles, trips, and alerts in the portal's data grids. This component renders only the page controls; it does not render a rows-per-page select or a range label — those are a separate concern (compose your own, or use MUI's TablePagination, which karoo-ui does not currently wrap).
keyRule: Desktop data grids paginate — they don't infinite-scroll. For large or server-driven data, fetch one page at a time rather than loading everything, and drive this Pagination's `page`/`count` from that server response.

variants.name: Outlined
variants.whenToUse: variant="outlined" — bordered page-number buttons, slightly higher emphasis.

variants.name: Rounded shape
variants.whenToUse: shape="rounded" for square-ish rounded buttons instead of the default circular ones.

anatomy.name: Previous / Next
anatomy.description: step one page at a time — PaginationItem type='previous'/'next', shown by default (hide with hidePrevButton/hideNextButton).

anatomy.name: First / Last
anatomy.description: optional jump-to-bounds buttons — enable with showFirstButton/showLastButton (both default false).

anatomy.name: Page numbers
anatomy.description: direct-jump buttons with the current page highlighted; siblingCount/boundaryCount control how many are shown around the current page and at the ends.

anatomy.name: Ellipsis
anatomy.description: a non-interactive '…' item MUI renders automatically when there are more pages than siblingCount/boundaryCount can show.

behaviors.name: Server vs client
behaviors.description: For small sets, page in the browser; for large/remote data, request each page from the server on `onChange` and show a loading state while fetching — this is app-level, not built into Pagination.

behaviors.name: Selection across pages
behaviors.description: If a data grid built around this Pagination supports row selection, keep the selection as the operator pages (and surface how many are selected in total) — a DataGrid-level concern.

behaviors.name: Resetting
behaviors.description: Changing filters or page size should reset to page one; preserve sort — app-level state management around this Pagination's `page` prop.

states.treatment: Filled with the active `color` (primary tint if color="primary"; standard tint otherwise) — pass `page` to control it.
Automatically disabled (38% opacity) at the first/last page — MUI computes this from `page`/`count` for you.

specs.value: size prop: 'small' | 'medium' (default) | 'large' — each PaginationItem scales accordingly; no separate 'footer height' spec (that belongs to a rows-per-page/range composition, not this component)
Default (unselected) item text uses semantic.color.text.secondary; PaginationItem's own font-size, not literally the caption token
color="standard" (default) uses action.selected; color="primary" uses semantic.color.interactive.primarySelected-equivalent tint (theme.palette.primary, alpha 0.08)

props.name: page
props.description: Current page, 1-indexed. Default 1 (or use `defaultPage` for uncontrolled use).

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when the operator moves to a different page (previous/next, first/last, or a numbered jump).

props.name: color
props.description: The active/current-page colour. Default 'standard' — pass 'primary' to use the brand tint.

props.name: shape
props.description: Shape of each page item. Default 'circular'.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual weight of each page item. Default 'text'.

props.name: siblingCount
props.description: How many page-number buttons to show on each side of the current page. Default 1.

props.name: boundaryCount
props.description: How many page-number buttons to show at the start/end. Default 1.

props.name: hidePrevButton
props.description: Hides the previous-page button. Default false.

props.name: hideNextButton
props.description: Hides the next-page button. Default false.

props.name: showFirstButton
props.description: Shows a jump-to-first-page button. Default false.

props.name: showLastButton
props.description: Shows a jump-to-last-page button. Default false.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables all items — e.g. while a page is loading.

props.name: getItemAriaLabel
props.description: Customize each item's accessible label, important for screen reader users and localization.

props.name: sx
props.description: Standard MUI system prop for one-off style overrides.

doThis: Pair this Pagination with your own total/range label and rows-per-page control if the data grid needs them — they're not built in.
Offer sensible page sizes (25/50/100) in whatever control drives `count`.
Fetch per page for large data, and disable the control while a page loads.
dontDoThis: Don't infinite-scroll a desktop data grid.
Don't lose selection or sort when paging.
Don't assume this component includes a rows-per-page/range label — that's a separate composition.
accessibility: Pagination renders a labelled <nav> automatically (aria-label="pagination navigation" by default).
The current page exposes aria-current, and prev/next/first/last convey their disabled state at the bounds automatically.
Use getItemAriaLabel to give each control a clear, localized accessible name.
All items are real buttons/links, keyboard operable with visible focus.

related.name: List
related.why: One common host for paginated records instead of a data grid
